meta.title: Kauã Braz Duarte — Full-Stack Developer

hero.tagline: I build web apps and {accent} with Bun, Node.js and TypeScript.

about.title: About me
about.p1: I'm a full-stack developer, {age} years old, focused on shipping web apps and automations with Bun, Node.js and TypeScript. I occasionally venture into Python and PHP.
about.p3: I specialize in AI automation — if an API has an endpoint, I'll integrate it. I lean heavily on Claude Code and Codex in my daily workflow.
about.p4: I'm not actively taking on work right now, but if you have an interesting proposal, drop me a line.

footer.quote: I bore witness to myself only when another named my passage.
